expectations.text: Identifies TrodesPosV1 as the LED-tracking path and DLCPosV1 as the pose-estimation path
expectations.evidence: 'TrodesPosV1 ... the SpikeGadgets / Trodes online tracking path' and 'DLCPosV1 ... DeepLabCut pose-estimation path'.

expectations.text: Notes that both can coexist as separate part-table entries on the same session
expectations.evidence: 'a single session can carry both a Trodes-LED-derived position and a DLC-derived position side by side ... PositionOutput.TrodesPosV1 and PositionOutput.DLCPosV1'.

expectations.text: Names at least one tradeoff dimension (latency / accuracy / setup cost / bodypart granularity)
expectations.evidence: Decision logic table covers Setup cost, Compute, Robustness, Accuracy, Latency, Bodypart granularity.
